sections.paragraph:
Original: חבב

Transliteration: chôbâb

Phonetic: kho-bawb'

BDB Definition:

Hobab = "cherished"
  1. the son of Reuel, the Midianite father-in-law of Moses, also known as Jethro, and brother-in-law of Moses

Origin: from H2245

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
